creator: scorpio@drkshdw.org
text:
Update the MASTER_SITES, because the litst master is unavailable about 90% of the time.
As a side note,  this port installs mm-2.7.tar.gz   converters/mmencode installs the same program
  Maybe we should merge the two?  (see http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=27657 )
